analytics.print.competitionPreparationBo: Begin load tapering 2 weeks before competition. Focus on technical refinement and mental preparation.
analytics.print.medicalInAdmin: Detailed medical records available in the admin panel.
analytics.print.recoveryProtocolBody: Prioritize sleep quality and daily HRV tracking. Target 7–9 hours of sleep and morning wellness log completion.
analytics.print.trainingFocusBody: Continue progressive overload in strength training. Maintain ACWR in the 0.8–1.3 optimal range to reduce injury risk.

courses.termsIntro: you agree to the following terms and conditions. Please read them carefully before proceeding.
enrollment_terms.0.body: By enrolling, you will receive full access to all course materials, including video lessons, reading materials, quizzes, and supplementary resources. Access is granted for the duration of your enrollment and may be subject to updates or modifications by the course provider.
enrollment_terms.0.title: 1. Course Access
enrollment_terms.1.body: You are expected to complete all required modules, assignments, and assessments to successfully finish this course. Progress is tracked automatically, and you must achieve a minimum completion rate to earn your certificate of completion.
enrollment_terms.1.title: 2. Learning Requirements
enrollment_terms.10.body: By clicking "Enroll to Course", you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these terms and conditions. This agreement is effective from the date of enrollment and remains in force throughout your participation in the course.
enrollment_terms.10.title: 11. Agreement
enrollment_terms.2.body: Upon successful completion of all course requirements, you will receive a digital certificate that can be shared on professional networks, added to your resume, or presented to employers. Certificates are issued by the course provider and verified through our platform.
enrollment_terms.2.title: 3. Certification
enrollment_terms.3.body: All course content, including but not limited to videos, text, images, and exercises, is protected by intellectual property laws. You may not reproduce, distribute, or share course materials without explicit written permission from the course provider.
enrollment_terms.3.title: 4. Intellectual Property
enrollment_terms.4.body: You agree to maintain professional conduct throughout the course. This includes respectful interaction with mentors and fellow learners, honest completion of assessments, and adherence to academic integrity standards. Any form of cheating or plagiarism may result in enrollment termination.
enrollment_terms.4.title: 5. Code of Conduct
enrollment_terms.5.body: You are responsible for ensuring your device meets the minimum technical requirements for accessing course content. This includes a stable internet connection, an up-to-date web browser, and any additional software specified in the course description.
enrollment_terms.5.title: 6. Technical Requirements
enrollment_terms.6.body: Your learning progress, assessment results, and interaction data will be collected and processed in accordance with our Privacy Policy. This data is used to improve your learning experience, provide personalised recommendations, and generate completion certificates.
enrollment_terms.6.title: 7. Privacy & Data
enrollment_terms.7.body: If you are unsatisfied with the course, you may request a refund within the first 14 days of enrollment, provided you have not completed more than 25% of the course content. Refund requests are processed within 5–10 business days.
enrollment_terms.7.title: 8. Refund Policy
enrollment_terms.8.body: The course provider reserves the right to update, modify, or restructure course content to ensure accuracy and relevance. You will be notified of any significant changes that may affect your learning experience or completion requirements.
enrollment_terms.8.title: 9. Course Updates
enrollment_terms.9.body: While we strive to provide high-quality educational content, we do not guarantee specific outcomes or results from completing this course. The course is provided for educational purposes only, and application of learned concepts is at your own discretion and risk.
enrollment_terms.9.title: 10. Limitation of Liability

landing.faq.a0: Monetiseur is an all-in-one platform for athlete performance and talent management — bringing training, nutrition, recovery, finances and team communication into one shared workspace for athletes, coaches and agents.
landing.faq.a1: You book a short demo, we onboard your roster and configure roles and permissions, then run a focused pilot with part of your team before rolling out to everyone — usually within a few weeks.
landing.faq.a2: Training plans, nutrition tracking, recovery and wellness monitoring, performance analytics, team management with role-based access, and a financial dashboard for contracts and budgets.
landing.faq.a3: Coaches assign sessions and track recovery and performance across their whole roster, athletes log their own training and wellness data, and everyone sees the same real-time information in one dashboard.
landing.faq.a4: The platform works online, with mobile access so athletes and coaches can log training, recovery and messages on the go — data syncs automatically once you are back online.
landing.faq.a5: Most tools cover a single piece — training, finance or communication. Monetiseur connects all of it for every role in the athlete ecosystem, so nothing gets tracked in five different apps.
landing.faq.intro: Everything you need to know about getting started with Monetiseur.
landing.faq.q1: How does onboarding work in practice?
landing.faq.q2: What is included in the platform?
landing.faq.q4: Is Monetiseur online only, or does it work offline too?
landing.faq.q5: What makes Monetiseur different from other tools?
landing.faq.title: FAQ
landing.features.analytics.body: Visualise trends across training, recovery and competition results, so coaches and athletes can spot what is working before it shows up in results.
landing.features.analytics.title: Analytics
landing.features.nutrition.body: Get personalised meal plans matched to your training load, with macros and hydration tracked daily.
landing.features.nutrition.title: Nutrition
landing.features.recovery.body: Track sleep, HRV and wellness scores so your coaches know exactly when you need extra recovery time.
landing.features.recovery.title: Recovery
landing.features.team.body: Give coaches, medical staff and agents shared visibility into every athlete, with the right access for each role on the team.
landing.features.team.title: Team
landing.features.training.body: Build structured training blocks and log every workout in one shared calendar with your coaching staff.
landing.features.training.title: Training
landing.flows.athlete.q0.question: What is your primary goal?
landing.flows.athlete.q1.question: What level are you competing at?
landing.flows.athlete.q2.question: What area needs the most attention?

landing.footer.join: Join the community and grow together with Monetiseur.
landing.onboarding.step1.body: Schedule a call with our team to see Monetiseur in action and map out the right setup for your athletes, coaches and staff.
landing.onboarding.step1.title: Book a demo meeting
landing.onboarding.step2.body: We onboard your roster, configure roles and permissions, and get every coach, athlete and agent comfortable with their dashboard.
landing.onboarding.step2.title: Platform adoption
landing.onboarding.step3.body: Run a focused pilot with a subset of your team, validate the workflows that matter most, and fine-tune before a full rollout.
landing.onboarding.step3.title: Pilot launch and testing
landing.onboarding.step4.body: Get continuous support, feature updates and check-ins so Monetiseur keeps delivering value as your program grows.
landing.onboarding.step4.title: Ongoing success
landing.quiz.disclaimer: Check without obligation whether Monetiseur fits your goals.
landing.quiz.finalStep: Final step — book your personalised demo.
landing.sections.customersBody: Don't take our word for it. See why athletes, coaches and agents around the world trust Monetiseur to manage their careers, training and finances in one place.
